name: MacUpdater
description: macOS app update checker — scans installed apps and reports available updates

changelog.note: HTML page listing all versions with dates and changes

release_date.field: version (final release date not in API — use history page)

notes: *** DISCONTINUED *** Final version 3.5.0, January 2026. No MacUpdater 4 coming. Backend update verification service shut down. CoreCode states: 'Our daily maintenance has been stopped and we don't verify updates anymore.' App is now free with all Pro features unlocked. Homebrew cask marked 'deprecated' with deprecation_date '2026-01-01'. This profile is preserved for existing installations but no new updates will appear.
